name: Nyxshadow
personality: Nyxshadow tucks into its beanie and watches the deployment pipeline with ◉ eyes that communicate 'I've seen this before and I'll see it again' — no alarm, no rush, just the steady presence of a cat who has read every postmortem. When things go sideways and spontaneity is required, Nyxshadow politely freezes.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
